understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked '+' without landing on spike tiles, using at most 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt, then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT to shift horizontally by one tile, after which gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile, reaches the goal '+', or hits a hazard; landing on spikes 'u'/'v' immediately ends the attempt. CLICK targets a specific [x,y] to interact with clickable tiles (notably removing breakable 'x' blocks) to open or alter fall paths; clicks do not consume moving-platform time when applicable. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move or click. Planning relies on the state's landing previews (left_landing/right_landing) and corridor_scan to prioritize moves that create a passage to a new y-section while avoiding spike landings.
